# Agent Context

_Compounded team knowledge for this project. Read at session start. Updated by `/compound-learnings` when patterns are discovered. Pruned periodically — remove patterns that are no longer accurate._

**Size discipline:** Keep under 200 lines. This file is loaded into every agent session. If a section grows beyond its purpose, extract detailed knowledge to `docs/solutions/` and link from here.

## Project Identity

- **Name:** [Project name]
- **Purpose:** [One-line description]
- **Stack:** [Language, framework, database, key dependencies with versions]
- **Architecture:** [Monolith/microservices/monorepo, key architectural pattern]

## Conventions

_Team conventions that aren't captured in global instructions or AGENTS.md. Add here when a convention is specific to THIS project._

## Compounded Patterns

_Patterns discovered during agent work sessions. Each entry should be a concise finding with a reference to the detailed solution in `docs/solutions/` if one exists._

_Format: `### [Category]: [Brief finding]` followed by one-sentence summary._

## Active Decisions

_Decisions currently in effect that agents should know about. Remove when a decision is superseded or no longer relevant._

## Gotchas and Pitfalls

_Hard-won knowledge about things that are easy to get wrong in this project. Each entry saves a future session from repeating the mistake._
